locator.quote: bet — it's just always ≈ 0.5 because the weights are zero.

text: An untrained fill-prob head outputs a non-null value on every bet — it's just always ≈ 0.5 because the weights are zero, so a null check isn't enough.

locator.quote: the switch flips itself: once the head is trained and values

text: The hide-near-default fix is data-driven so the switch flips itself: once the head is trained and values spread away from 0.5, chips start appearing.
